source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

upgrades.name: Bigger Stacks
upgrades.description: Creates larger piles of spikes per shot.

upgrades.name: White Hot Spikes
upgrades.description: Cuts through Lead Bloons and Frozen Bloons.

upgrades.name: Spiked Balls
upgrades.description: Produces spiked balls that do extra damage to Ceramic and Fortified Bloons.

upgrades.name: Spiked Mines
upgrades.description: Spiked mines explode violently when they lose all their spikes.

upgrades.name: Super Mines
upgrades.description: Creates gigantic exploding spiked mines that can wipe out almost anything.

upgrades.name: Spike Storm
upgrades.description: Spike Storm ability: Shoots out a thick layer of spikes over the entire track.

upgrades.name: Carpet of Spikes
upgrades.description: Regularly sets a carpet of spikes over the whole track.

upgrades.name: Long Reach
upgrades.description: Increases range for spike pile drops, plus piles last longer.

upgrades.name: Smart Spikes
upgrades.description: Spike Factory gains special targeting priority and accelerated production at the start of each round.

upgrades.name: Long Life Spikes
upgrades.description: Spikes last much longer and can carry over one round.

upgrades.name: Deadly Spikes
upgrades.description: Extra deadly spikes can pop through 3 layers per spike and last another round.

upgrades.name: Perma-Spike
upgrades.description: High damage spikes become almost permanent.
